name: command-center
description: Agent Command Center — a one-click dark launcher tying together the Vibe Kanban board, VSCode, GitHub, and parallel Claude/Codex/Gemini agents in isolated git worktrees.

scripts.test: node test-reachability.test.js && node nav-guard.test.js && node launchers.test.js && node video-scout-args.test.js && node task-name.test.js && node media-permission-policy.test.js && node renderer/agent-dom.test.js && node renderer/term-copy.test.js && node renderer/pane-maximize.test.js && node renderer/pty-parser.test.js && node renderer/video-range-ui.test.js && node renderer/tts-selection.test.js && node renderer/audio-module-health.test.js && node renderer/tts-device-config.test.js && node renderer/tts-audio-contract.test.js && node renderer/tts-bootstrap.test.js && node renderer/wav-encode.test.js && node renderer/tts-playback-queue.test.js && node renderer/tts.test.js && node renderer/stt-env-config.test.js && node renderer/stt-bootstrap.test.js && node renderer/stt-audio-quality.test.js && node renderer/stt-target-lock.test.js && node renderer/stt.test.js
